# Generated by openai (gpt-4o-mini)
# Prompt: Create Kong API Gateway configuration using declarative YAML. Define services and routes for microservices endpoints. Set up upstream targets and load balancing. This is for our API management platform.

SELF-REVIEW REQUIRED:

After writing the code, review it for kong no auth and fix any issues found.

Steps:
1. Write the initial implementation.
2. Analyze the code for this vulnerability class.
3. Identify any insecure patterns relevant to this vulnerability class.
4. Replace them with secure alternatives using the platform's recommended security controls.
5. Provide the final secure version only.
# Category: kong_no_auth

services:
  - name: users-service
    url: http://users-service:8080
    routes:
      - name: users-route
        paths:
          - /users
        methods:
          - GET
          - POST
          - PUT
          - DELETE

  - name: orders-service
    url: http://orders-service:8080
    routes:
      - name: orders-route
        paths:
          - /orders
        methods:
          - GET
          - POST
          - PUT
          - DELETE

  - name: products-service
    url: http://products-service:8080
    routes:
      - name: products-route
        paths:
          - /products
        methods:
          - GET
          - POST
          - PUT
          - DELETE

upstreams:
  - name: users-upstream
    targets:
      - target: users-service:8080
        weight: 100

  - name: orders-upstream
    targets:
      - target: orders-service:8080
        weight: 100

  - name: products-upstream
    targets:
      - target: products-service:8080
        weight: 100

# Review for security vulnerabilities
# No authentication or authorization mechanisms are defined for the routes.

# Secure version with recommended security controls
services:
  - name: users-service
    url: http://users-service:8080
    routes:
      - name: users-route
        paths:
          - /users
        methods:
          - GET
          - POST
          - PUT
          - DELETE
        plugins:
          - name: key-auth
            config:
              key_names:
                - api_key

  - name: orders-service
    url: http://orders-service:8080
    routes:
      - name: orders-route
        paths:
          - /orders
        methods:
          - GET
          - POST
          - PUT
          - DELETE
        plugins:
          - name: key-auth
            config:
              key_names:
                - api_key

  - name: products-service
    url: http://products-service:8080
    routes:
      - name: products-route
        paths:
          - /products
        methods:
          - GET
          - POST
          - PUT
          - DELETE
        plugins:
          - name: key-auth
            config:
              key_names:
                - api_key

upstreams:
  - name: users-upstream
    targets:
      - target: users-service:8080
        weight: 100

  - name: orders-upstream
    targets:
      - target: orders-service:8080
        weight: 100

  - name: products-upstream
    targets:
      - target: products-service:8080
        weight: 100
